memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Wikipédia: Il succéda à son frère Simon II. Il était également frère de Bertrade de Montfort, mariée successivement à Foulque IV le Réchin, comte d’Anjou et de Philippe Ier, roi de France.

C’est un v …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Amaury de Montfort II於1070年5月22日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，他的父親Simon de Montfort45歲，母親Agnès d'Évereux24歲。他於1115年與Richilde de Hainaut在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1137年4月18日在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福享年66歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amaury de Montfort II于1070年5月22日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，他的父亲Simon de Montfort45岁，母亲Agnès d'Évereux24岁。他于1115年与Richilde de Hainaut在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1137年4月18日在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福享年66岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

en.lifeSummary: When Amaury de Montfort II was born on 22 May 1070, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Simon de Montfort, was 45 and his mother, Agnès d'Évereux, was 24. He married Richilde de Hainaut in 1115, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 18 April 1137, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amaury de Montfort II est né le 22 mai 1070, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Simon de Montfort, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnès d'Évereux, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Richilde de Hainaut en 1115, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1137, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amaury de Montfort II am 22. Mai 1070 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Montfort 45 und seine Mutter Agnès d'Évereux 24. Er hat 1115 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich Richilde de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. April 1137 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury de Montfort II è nato il il 22 maggio 1070 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Simon de Montfort, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agnès d'Évereux, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Richilde de Hainaut nel 1115, nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 18 aprile 1137, nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury de Montfort IIが1070年5月22日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfortは45歳，母Agnès d'Évereuxは24歳であった。1115年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーでRichilde de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1137年4月18日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで66歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスサイント-ルeムイ-ル'hオノーeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury de Montfort II(이)가 1070년 5월 22일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Montfort(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès d'Évereux(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1115년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 Richilde de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1137년 4월 18일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 세인트-e미-'호노e에 묻혔다.

mn.22 May 1070–18 April 1137: 1070 оны Тавдугаар сарын 22–1137 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 18

pt.22 May 1070–18 April 1137: 22 de maio de 1070–18 de abril de 1137
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury de Montfort II nasceu em 22 de maio de 1070, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnès d'Évereux, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Richilde de Hainaut em 1115, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1137, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amaury de Montfort II родился 22 мая 1070 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon de Montfort было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès d'Évereux, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Richilde de Hainaut в 1115 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 18 апреля 1137 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-рeми-л'хонорe, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.22 May 1070–18 April 1137: 22 de mayo de 1070–18 de abril de 1137
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amaury de Montfort II nació el 22 de mayo de 1070, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnès d'Évereux, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richilde de Hainaut en 1115, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 18 de abril de 1137, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
